task: F016 Open Secret Box — build the 'chưa mở' modal (MoMorph frame J3-4YFIpMM) + real open backend: sunner_badges table + SECURITY DEFINER open_secret_box() RPC (weighted random 30/25/10/5/20/10), entitlement = GREATEST(0, FLOOR(hearts received / 5) - opened), wired to both existing CTAs (kudos sidebar + profile stats).
acceptanceCriteria: SC-001 — the unopened count shown in the modal always equals FLOOR(received_hearts / 5) - opened, never negative (covers FR-004, BR-001)
SC-002 — a box click while unopened > 0 always results in exactly one new sunner_badges row and a counter decrease of exactly 1 (covers FR-005, FR-006, BR-003)
SC-003 — a box click while unopened <= 0 never calls the RPC and never changes any count (covers FR-007, DEC-001)
SC-004 — no client-supplied count or badge value is ever persisted without passing through open_secret_box(); RLS on sunner_badges rejects every client INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE (covers BR-002)
SC-005 — a signed-out request never computes a real count nor calls open_secret_box(); it always short-circuits to auth_required (covers FR-008)
